texto: I have no special desire to go crawl around in caves, but I really like the word [spelunking] and want to use it in conversation. I do a lot of things just to use words I like.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Evan Mandery: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I have no special desire to go crawl around in caves, but I really like the word [spelunking] and…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, spelunking, words pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de words.
